title: DNSDB - Related Hostnames from Hostname
content:
A playbook that “pivots” in DNSDB to retrieve a limited number of other hostnames seen on the same IPs as the target hostname.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Farsight Security, Inc. pack (DNSDB, partner-supported).

Inputs — Domain: The domain name to enhance with related domain names from Farsight DNSDB..

Outputs — relatedHostnames: An array of hostnames related to the inputs..

Integrations/scripts used: DNSDB_v2.
